name: yahoo-fantasy-baseball
description: AI-powered Yahoo Fantasy Baseball — roster management, Statcast analytics, and free-agent scouting via natural language.

interface.shortDescription: Manage your Yahoo Fantasy Baseball team by chat
interface.longDescription: Let Codex help manage your Yahoo Fantasy Baseball team: check your roster, scout free agents, review your matchup, and analyze players with Statcast and FanGraphs data. You bring your own free Yahoo app credentials and complete a one-time authorization right inside the chat (just say "fantasy start"). Nothing is hosted — everything runs locally and your credentials stay on your machine.
defaultPrompt: Show my roster and this week's matchup
Who should I start tonight, and are there better free agents available?
